summary: Comprehensive testing of ReVent app (fresh implementation). Fixed critical gemini-2.0-flash model issue (404 NOT_FOUND). All 22 backend tests passing after fix. All frontend flows verified working: auth, chat, gossip, settings, mobile/desktop layout, onboarding.

critical.issue: gemini-2.0-flash model returning 404 NOT_FOUND - 'not available to new users'. Was causing 500 on all chat endpoints, resulting in 520 Cloudflare errors.
critical.status: FIXED - Updated to gemini-2.5-flash in graph.py and server.py

minor.issue: bcrypt warning in logs: 'AttributeError: module bcrypt has no attribute __about__'. Non-critical passlib version compatibility issue.

issues: settings-logout-btn missing data-testid attribute - had to use text-based selector for testing
File is 1578 lines long - consider splitting into separate component files for maintainability

action_items: Add data-testid='settings-logout-btn' to the Log Out button in SettingsScreen component
Consider splitting App.jsx (1578 lines) into separate component files for maintainability
critical_code_review_comments: gemini-2.0-flash in graph.py and server.py returned 404 for new users - FIXED to gemini-2.5-flash
App.jsx is a single 1578-line file with all components - violates file size best practices (>700 lines). Should split into Chat.jsx, Sidebar.jsx, Auth.jsx, Settings.jsx etc.
CORS: allow_origins only includes APP_URL + localhost - verify APP_URL env is set correctly in production
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Changed gemini-2.0-flash to gemini-2.5-flash in refine-backstory endpoint

test_credentials.note: User has onboarding_complete=true, so lands directly on chat

seed_data_creation: Created testuser_vent@test.com (Test123!) for testing. Also created test_signup_* user via signup flow.

features_verified.auth_signup_new_user: PASS - New user creates account, sees beta modal, goes through onboarding, lands on chat
features_verified.auth_login_existing_user: PASS - Existing user with onboarding_complete=true lands directly on chat
features_verified.chat_welcome_message: PASS - 'Hey. You showed up — that already took something. 💜\n\nThis is your space. Say whatever. I'm not going anywhere.' visible immediately
features_verified.chat_emotion_bar: PASS - 7 emoji buttons visible at bottom
features_verified.gossip_floating_button: PASS - Visible bottom-right both mobile and desktop
features_verified.character_tabs_mobile: PASS - RE, Vibe 1, Shadow, Logic, + Create visible in header on mobile (390px)
features_verified.desktop_sidebar: PASS - 240px sidebar with logo, user info, vibes, gossip room, language selector, settings
features_verified.desktop_sidebar_items: PASS - Shows gossip room button, vibe selectors (RE, Vibe 1, Shadow, Logic), settings
features_verified.chat_send_message: PASS - Message sent and AI responds with appropriate mode (BACK ME for unfair boss)
features_verified.gossip_mode_navigation: PASS - Floating button and sidebar button both open gossip chat
features_verified.gossip_exit: PASS - Exit & Dissolve returns to main chat, gossip messages cleared
features_verified.settings_access: PASS - Settings icon in header navigates to settings
features_verified.settings_logout: PASS - Log Out button returns to auth screen

context_for_next_testing_agent: App is fully functional after gemini-2.0-flash -> gemini-2.5-flash fix. Test user: testuser_vent@test.com / Test123! (already has onboarding complete). Backend 22/22 tests passing. All frontend flows working. Minor: add data-testid to settings logout button.

rca_of_issue.root_cause: gemini-2.0-flash model is no longer available for new API keys in Google AI. The model returns 404 NOT_FOUND with message 'This model models/gemini-2.0-flash is no longer available to new users. Please update your code to use a newer model.'
rca_of_issue.fix: Updated model name from 'gemini-2.0-flash' to 'gemini-2.5-flash' in /app/backend/graph.py (ChatGoogleGenerativeAI models) and /app/backend/server.py (LlmChat refine-backstory endpoint)
